name: Medium Transportable Storage Black Edge Binding - Brightroom™: Car & Trunk Organizer, Automotive Accessories
description:
The Medium Transportable Storage from Brightroom™ is ideal for storage in a vehicle while on the go. The black medium structured bag features side zippered pockets and exterior mesh pockets to help keep a wide variety of accessories contained. It boasts a lidded top design for secure storage and built-in handles on the sides allow for easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
